title: 1. Opening. SMIB
cue: As the Chaplain says - in harmony
lyrics: The lodge being duly formed, before it is declared open let us invoke a blessing from the GAOTU on all our undertakings. May our labours, thus begun in order, be conducted in peace, and closed in harmony.
Ode 1
So mote it be

title: 2. Open 1st TB
cue: Wait for the IG/Tyler to knock three times
lyrics: Ode 2

Hail, Eternal, by Whose aid, All created things were made; Heav'n and earth, Thy vast design; Hear us, Architect divine. May our work, begun in Thee, Ever blest with order be, And may we, when labours cease, Part in harmony and peace.

title: Minutes
cue: After the WM knocks to carry the motion
lyrics: This is some nice music, part of the William Tell Overture, to play when the Senior Deacon takes the minutes up to be signed.

title: Visitor Entry
cue: When the IG opens the door
lyrics: asdf

title: PM/WM Entry
cue: When the DC heads west to escort the visitors
lyrics: Before the DC starts announcing the visitors, lower the volume to barely audible, but keep it playing.
The tune is called Scipio.

title: WM Entry Star Wars
cue: When the door is opened to admit the WM
lyrics: Note: This is a fun track and may not always be appropriate

title: 66. Closing. SMIB.
cue: As the Chaplain says - social virtue
lyrics: Brethren, before the lodge is closed, let us, with all reverence and humility, express our gratitude to the GAOTU for favours already received. May he continue to preserve our order by cementing and adorning it with every moral and social virtue.
Ode 66
So mote it be

title: 68. Close 1st TB
cue: Wait for the IG/Tyler to knock three times
lyrics: Ode 68
Abide with me, fast falls the eventide; The darkness deepens, Lord, with me abide; When other helpers fail, and comforts flee, Help of the helpless, O abide with me.

title: 69. Fidelity
cue: When the IPM is saying - the act
lyrics: Brethren, nothing now remains but, according to Antient custom, to lock up our s . . . ts in a safe and sacred repository, uniting in the act
Ode 69
Fidelity, Fidelity, Fidelity; And may God preserve the Craft

title: 70.2. Retirement Procession
cue: After the DC says - Brother Deacons
lyrics: Ode 70.2
The day Thou gavest, Lord, is ended, The darkness falls at Thy behest; To Thee our morning hymns ascended, Thy praise shall sanctify our rest.

title: Exit - Onward Brother Masons
cue: After the WM says - and Brethren
lyrics: Onwards Brother Masons..

title: Exit - William Tell
cue: After the WM says - and Brethren
lyrics: This is a bit fun, so use appropriately
